title: Infinite Brainstorm board.json
description: Schema for the agent-native infinite canvas board file. Validate with `brainstorm validate ./board.json`.

version.description: Optional schema version. Absent means current (1). A version newer than the running build is loaded with a warning (forward-compatible).

id.description: Unique node identifier (UUID recommended). Must be unique across all nodes.

x.description: World-space X of the node's top-left corner. Must be finite.

y.description: World-space Y of the node's top-left corner. Must be finite.

width.description: Node width. 0 (or omitted) triggers auto-size on load based on text.

height.description: Node height. 0 (or omitted) triggers auto-size on load based on text.

text.description: Node content. For image/link nodes this is a path or URL; for md nodes it is markdown.

node_type.description: Visual/behavioral kind. Unknown values load as a neutral fallback (forward-compatible).

status.description: Optional workflow status (e.g. todo, in-progress, done).

group.description: Optional group id. Nodes sharing a group render inside one bounding box.

id.description: Unique edge identifier. Must be unique across all edges.

from_node.description: Source node id. Must reference an existing node.

to_node.description: Target node id. Must reference an existing node.

label.description: Optional relationship label rendered at the edge midpoint (e.g. 'depends on', 'blocks').
